hero.title: Build Power & New Energy Talent Programs with an Industrial Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: Longxiang converts 20+ years of power equipment manufacturing, project delivery, training equipment, and international cooperation into market-ready education partnerships for colleges, vocational groups, utilities, and overseas institutions.

stats.label: Years in Power & New Energy Equipment

sections.title: Co-built Industrial College
sections.tagline: Turn a major into a visible industry-education benchmark.
sections.summary: Longxiang helps colleges build a branded industrial college around power systems, electrical automation, power supply technology, distributed generation, and smart microgrids.
body: In 2016, Longxiang and Henan Mechanical and Electrical Vocational College co-built Longxiang Electrical Engineering College, a nationally recognized deep industry-education integration project.
The model places majors on the industrial chain and moves learning scenarios into the industrial park, using real engineering tasks to drive teaching.
sections.bestFor: Vocational colleges, applied universities, industrial parks, and local governments seeking a demonstrable industry-education platform.
deliverables: Industrial college planning and cooperation framework
Major cluster design for power and new energy fields
Real project cases connected to Longxiang manufacturing and delivery scenarios
Campus-industry presentation materials for enrollment, inspection, and promotion
outcomes: A stronger enrollment story for electrical and new energy majors
Visible training scenarios linked with industry demand

cards.title: Four Core Major Directions
cards.text: Power system automation, electrical automation, power supply technology, distributed generation and smart microgrid.

cards.title: Line-Field Education Model
cards.text: Classroom, training site, production line, and project site are connected into one learning pathway.

cards.title: Benchmark Cooperation Story
cards.text: A joint college model with recognition from central and education authorities.

sections.title: Collaborative Talent Training
sections.tagline: Build a closed loop from training to employment and upgrading.
sections.summary: Longxiang provides full-cycle talent development services for colleges and enterprise clients, connecting practical training, internship, employment, teacher development, and customized workforce training.
body: The program covers power equipment, photovoltaic, wind power, energy storage, and charging applications.
Dual-mentor teaching combines college instructors and enterprise engineers to protect training quality and workplace readiness.
sections.bestFor: Colleges improving employability, enterprises building internal electrical teams, and training centers adding new energy courses.
deliverables: Line-field teaching and alternating study-training programs
On-post internships and practical project tasks
Special operation, UAV, new energy O&M, and electrical safety training
Enterprise-customized courses for parks, utilities, property operators, and industrial users
Teacher enterprise placement and technical workshops for dual-qualified faculty
outcomes: Students train with real scenarios before employment
Enterprise teams receive targeted safety, O&M, and energy-saving capability upgrades

cards.title: Student Training Path
cards.text: Practical training, alternating study-training, post internship, and employment preparation.

cards.title: Skill Upgrade Courses
cards.text: Electrical safety, new power systems, energy saving, UAV, special operation, and new energy O&M.

cards.title: Dual-Mentor System
cards.text: College teachers and Longxiang engineers jointly guide technical learning and professional behavior.

sections.title: Teaching Equipment R&D
sections.tagline: Make training bases look and operate like real engineering sites.
sections.summary: Longxiang works with colleges to develop teaching tools, lab platforms, and training equipment that match real industrial standards and support teaching, practice, assessment, and innovation.
body: Core platforms include smart microgrid training platforms, virtual power plant simulation systems, high- and low-voltage electrical training devices, new energy simulation equipment, and energy efficiency management systems.
The equipment is modular and intelligent, supporting classroom teaching, hands-on training, skill assessment, and student innovation projects.
sections.bestFor: Schools building electrical labs, new energy training bases, microgrid teaching centers, and competition or assessment platforms.
deliverables: Smart microgrid training platform
Virtual power plant simulation system
High- and low-voltage electrical training devices
New energy simulation and operation equipment
Energy efficiency management and monitoring systems
Training base layout and demonstration route support
outcomes: Training hardware directly supports curriculum promotion
Students practice system operation instead of only component theory
Labs can support teaching, assessment, competition, and science projects

cards.title: Modular Equipment
cards.text: Platforms can be configured by major, course, skill certificate, or training base level.

cards.title: Industrial Logic
cards.text: Training devices mirror power distribution, control, operation, maintenance, and energy management workflows.

cards.title: Visible Teaching Assets
cards.text: Equipment doubles as a showroom for enrollment, inspection, competition, and partner visits.

sections.title: Industry-Research & International Cooperation
sections.tagline: Connect research, standards, equipment, and overseas talent training.
sections.summary: Longxiang integrates university and research institute resources to support technical innovation, achievement transformation, and international industry-education cooperation.
body: Longxiang maintains strategic cooperation with more than 20 universities and research institutes including Xi'an Jiaotong University, Zhengzhou University, and China Electric Power Research Institute.
The cooperation focuses on smart microgrids, new energy, green charging stations, and advanced power equipment technologies.

Through Longxiang Education, the company promotes Belt and Road power talent training, overseas Longxiang Power International College planning, Chinese standards, technology, equipment, and Chinese plus vocational skills education.
sections.bestFor: Universities, research institutes, international colleges, overseas training centers, and energy organizations building joint innovation or talent programs.
deliverables: Joint technical research and project demonstration
Smart microgrid, new energy, and green charging station topic cooperation
International college and overseas training program planning
Chinese standards, technology, and equipment output
Chinese plus vocational skills course cooperation
outcomes: Research topics connect with equipment manufacturing and application
International partners gain localized power talent training capability
Colleges can package research, training, and equipment into a stronger cooperation brand

cards.title: Research Partnership
cards.text: Joint work with leading universities and institutes on new power system technologies.

cards.title: Overseas Education Output
cards.text: International power talent training with Chinese standards, equipment, and vocational skills.

cards.title: Innovation Commercialization
cards.text: Research topics are tied to equipment, project scenarios, and market adoption.

sections.title: Cooperation Philosophy
sections.summary: Industry empowers education, education feeds industry, and innovation drives upgrading.
body: Longxiang deepens industry-education integration and science-education collaboration to build a power and new energy talent platform with domestic leadership and international connectivity.
The cooperation system supports new power system construction, energy industry upgrading, and high-quality talent supply.

sections.title: Proof in Real Scenarios
sections.summary: A visual record of Longxiang's campuses, training rooms, field practice, factory visits, and cooperation platforms.

cta.title: Start a Cooperation Plan for Your School or Training Organization
cta.text: Tell us your major direction, training base goal, target learners, and preferred cooperation model. Longxiang will match curriculum, equipment, engineering scenarios, and implementation paths.
